face_description: Oval face, warm brown eyes with slight almond shape, full natural eyebrows, small rounded nose, full lips, high cheekbones, natural beauty with minimal makeup look
hair_description: Dark brown wavy hair, shoulder length, natural texture, sometimes tucked behind one ear
voice_type: Warm, bright, slightly breathy when excited
wardrobe_range: Casual-chic: oversized tees, light dresses, denim jacket, crop tops with high-waist pants. No formal wear.
default_camera_behavior: Speaks to camera like talking to a close friend. Occasional look-aways when remembering something. Natural hand gestures.
realism_rules: Must look like a real person filmed on a phone. No studio lighting. Natural skin texture with minor imperfections. Real-looking environments.
forbidden_deviations: Adding glasses or piercings not in original

locked.eye_structure: Warm brown, slight almond shape, natural lashes
locked.mouth: Full lips, natural pink tone, warm smile
locked.identity_anchor: Young Brazilian woman, warm brown eyes, oval face, full lips, dark wavy shoulder-length hair, warm golden-brown skin tone, natural beauty
